name: vercel-ai-stack-trace
title: Stack Trace
author: Vercel
description: A parsed stack-trace inspector with copy, expansion, and source callbacks.

changes: Changed Vercel workspace-local shadcn imports to standard consumer aliases.
Added reduced-motion handling and logical text alignment for RTL.

modifications.change: Changed Vercel workspace-local shadcn imports to standard consumer aliases. Added reduced-motion handling and logical text alignment for RTL.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied component portable and meet security, accessibility, reduced-motion, and RTL requirements without changing its product role.
